summary: Batman/Gotham 9-tier archive; canon hierarchy + Azrael rule + Issue #1-2 proofs is a preserved project packet for the current lossless replacement handoff archive for the user's long-form Batman/Gotham story project — a serial comic structured around an anti-hopelessness moral constitution ("trauma != destiny; appearance != morality; redemption != death"), a White Rose / Winter-Thaw-Fire season structure, and a detective-architecture-per-issue discipline (false frame — hidden grammar — Batman.
final_use_case: It treats expression as an instrument with audience, warrant, cadence, and rhetorical-risk controls rather than as decorative prose.
